resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to a thoughtfully designed 3 BHK home in the lush surroundings of Godrej Green Glades, Jagatpur  a perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience in one of Ahmedabads most rapidly developing localities. The flat offers a comfortable carpet area of 76.39 square meters, along with an exclusive area of 9.43 square meters for added privacy and utility.Property SpecificationsThe semi-furnished flat is located on the 12th floor of a 23-storey building. It is Vaastu compliant and allows ample flow of sunlight into the flat. The flat is configured with 3 tastefully designed bedrooms which are all well ventilated, and two western bathrooms one bathroom is attached to the master bedroom and the other bathroom is common for guests  family which are equipped with geysers.The flat also has two balconies one from the bedroom with cool wind flows  the other connected to the hall, overlooking the well-maintained garden, a perfect place to relax in the mornings or evenings. The living and dining area is considerably spacious and effectively integrated allowing family interaction and entertainment.The modular kitchen has a piped gas connection and attached utility area allowing best utilization of space for daily chores. The flat has an appealing combination of granite and vitrified flooring for aesthetics  longevity.FacilitiesThis flat has the benefit of dedicated covered parking for two vehicles It has all basic utilities covered and essentials as well, such as 24-hour water access and full power backup. There is manned security at the entrance with CCTV and security cameras covering every corner of the property for security and peace of mind. There are three lifts to the residents to ensure the smooth-flow of all residents, especially on the way tofrom work during peak hours.LocalityThe property is nicely located near Jagatpur making it convenient for easy access to daily needs and social infrastructure. Schools and hospitals are within a kilometer and there are at least a couple malls, supermarkets, and ATMs just as close. Public transport is convenient, plus the nearest metro station is only 1 to 2 kilometers away allowing easy connection to the rest of the city. Whether you are a family looking for a serene neighborhood or a professional wanting a smart purchase, you are sure to find this home perfect
